languages.text: "Мудрое решение, Лорд-капитан. Приятно видеть искреннюю заботу о ваших влож.... о протекторате".
"A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."
languages.original_text: "Мудрое решение, Лорд-капитан. Приятно видеть искреннюю заботу о ваших влож.... о протекторате".

traits.locale_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."
"A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."
"A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

languages.text: 「賢明な判断、キャプテン卿。投資に真摯な関心を示されているのは、嬉しいことです」
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: 「賢明な判断、キャプテン卿。投資に真摯な関心を示されているのは、嬉しいことです。」

languages.text: «Una decisión sabia, Lord Capitán. Me alegra ver tanto interés por su inver... por su protectorado».
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: «Una decisión sabia, Lord Capitán. Me alegra ver tanto interés por su inver... por su protectorado».

languages.text: “明智的决定，舰长大人。见到您真正关心自己的投……呃，属地，真是令人宽慰。”
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: “明智的决定，舰长大人。见到您真正关心自己的投……呃，属地，真是令人宽慰。”

languages.text: "Eine weise Entscheidung, Lord Captain. Es ist gut, dass ihr um Eure Investi... das Protektorat ernsthaft besorgt seid."
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: "Eine weise Entscheidung, Lord Captain. Es ist gut, dass ihr um Eure Investi... das Protektorat ernsthaft besorgt seid."

languages.text: "Bilgece bir karar Lord Kaptan. Yatırı... Protektoranız için samimi bir endişe duyduğunuzu görmek güzel."
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: "Bilgece bir karar Lord Kaptan. Yatırı... Protektoranız için samimi bir endişe duyduğunuzu görmek güzel."

languages.text: « Une sage décision, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je me réjouis de vous voir à ce point {mf|préoccupé|préoccupée} par le sort de votre investiss... du protectorat. »
languages.original_text: "A wise decision, Lord Captain. It is good to see genuine concern for your investm— the protectorate."
